AUTOHIDE.HINT: Automatically hide the token after the death effects finish.
AUTOHIDE.LABEL: Auto-Hide

AUTOTRANSPARENT.HINT: Automatically set the token's opacityt o 0 after the death effects finish.
AUTOTRANSPARENT.LABEL: Auto-Transparent

EDITTIMELINE.HINT:
Edit the death effect animation timeline.
See the wiki for more information.
EDITTIMELINE.LABEL: Edit Timeline

ENABLE.HINT: Toggle on to automatically run death effects when actor is taken out.
ENABLE.LABEL: Enable Death Effects

SOURCE.HINT: Select where to store the effect configuration for this token
SOURCE.LABEL: Configuration Source
